puzzles.author: Puzzle Team

entries.clue: _____ at the end of the tunnel

rules: Every clue contains exactly one blank placeholder.
The blank represents the complete crossword answer, not a partial word suffix.
All coordinates fit inside the puzzle grid.
Intersecting entries agree on shared letters.
Entries in the same direction do not overlap.
Given cells are unique and match their correct letters.
Puzzle IDs are unique and exactly 10 starter puzzles are marked free.
Starter clues were reviewed for common phrase-answer fit, not only structural validity.
phraseReviewNotes: Partial-word blanks were replaced with whole-word phrase clues.
Ambiguous or incorrect phrase pairings such as weakest chain, smoke and mirror, and late flower were replaced.
Same-direction duplicate/prefix overlaps were removed from affected puzzles.
